title: Create: Treefying Creations
description:
Welcome to Create: Treefying Creations! This is my first modpack I created that contains different interesting mods that I found.
The appeal is to make cool and sometimes funny contraptions with your friends on a server or LAN.
Have fun!
body:
# Purpose
The modpack's purpose is to **create** [ get it? ] contraptions that you can show to different people (friends etc). The modpack contains mods from **Modrinth** & **Curseforge** [ checked for virus with **Modrinth's Detection Tool** and **Curseforge (Overwolf) JAR Detection Tool** ].
# Appeal
The appeal is to make **cool** and **sometimes funny contraptions** with your friends on a server or LAN.
# Content
It contains some **primary mods** like:
- Chipped
- Create 
- Create: Steam 'n' Rails
- Create: Deco
- Farmer's Delight
- FramedBlocks
- Jade (with addons)
- Immersive Paintings
- Just Enough Items
- Rechiseled
- Nature's Compass
- Storage Drawers
- Xaero's Minimap + World Map
- [Dave's Building Extended](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/daves-building-extended)

Also contains some nice **client mods**:
- Oculus
- Chat Heads
- [Cosmetic Armor Reworked](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/cosmetic-armor-reworked)
- Freecam
- Ok Zoomer
- Mouse Tweaks
- No Chat Reports
- Xaero's Minimap + World Map
# Server Hosting
To host a server, you need to have basic knowledge of to put the mods in the mods folder in your server files. You just need to remove:
- Oculus
- Rubidium
  
Optional:
- All the client mods
